docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO DEC-02-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENLOLO, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASSIDY, MICHAEL $3,781.46 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,861.46, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR HIS PREVIOUS PAYMENT IN PARTIAL REFUND OF PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-07-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CASSIDY, MICHAEL
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT CASSIDY, MICHAEL ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-02-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2008 - JUDGMENT.
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO THE JUDGE FILED BY DEFENDANT CASSIDY, MICHAEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,635.10 FILED BY BENLOLO, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT CASSIDY, MICHAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER "GRANTED" ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. - SIGNED BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
